response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship, TDD, and distributed-systems experience, but the role specifically demands a hands-on C++ developer with deep STL/multi-threading, IoT/MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity exposure. C++ appears only briefly (National Instruments, 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis), with no evidence of recent C++ architecture work, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850), or SDL/IEC 62443 practice. The bulk of recent experience is TypeScript/Node/DLang, which is adjacent but not a substitute.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring
Distributed/high-throughput systems experience (Sociomantic micro-services, event-driven Geo platform)
Polyglot background including some C/C++ at National Instruments and systems-level DLang work
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL production experience in the last ~10 years
No demonstrated industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle practice
No exposure to industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or IoT/automation domain

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering craftsmanship and distributed-systems track record
